strategy: Attack with Ice (he takes +30% Ice); never Fire (60% resist).
Minimize blades. Non-Fire blades give him Brimstone Revenant on you, universal blades let him Steal your charm, and Fire blades risk a Steam Charm, so lean on traps and pips instead.
Use Mass Hex for setup, not universal traps. Universal traps make him Immolate the caster, while Mass Hex is confirmed safe (Mass Feint, however, triggers it).

Do not waste turns clearing Skirker Busters. He resummons every dead or missing one at the end of each Round, and with all three up they run a death cycle feeding him a +30% Dark Tribute, a Sacrifice heal, then Bad Juju.
End it fast. Each time he casts a damage spell he gains a Firespear, so his hits ramp every turn.
At 17,500 Health with three reviving minions, bring a team: one hitter, Mass Hex for traps, and heals for the incoming Fire and Bad Juju.
cheatNotes: Every time Lambent Fire casts a damage spell he gains a Firespear, so his hits grow each turn; end the fight quickly.
Casting a non-Fire, non-universal blade makes him hit the recipient with Brimstone Revenant, so avoid school blades.
Casting a universal blade lets him Steal that charm off the recipient.
Casting any Fire blade, including Elemental Blade, can randomly trigger a Steam Charm on you.
Pet may-cast blades trigger these blade cheats too.
Casting a universal trap on him makes him Immolate the caster.
Mass Hex is safe and does not trigger the trap cheat, but Mass Feint does, so use Mass Hex for setup.
When a Skirker Buster lands its 2,050 Fire Natural Attack it then Immolates itself for 100% of its Health.
At the end of every Round he resummons any defeated or missing Skirker Busters, so clearing them is wasted turns.
The death cycle only runs while all three Skirker Busters are present, cycling each Round and repeating every three.
Cycle Round 1: the first Skirker casts a +30% Dark Tribute onto Lambent Fire.
Cycle Round 2: the second Skirker Sacrifices itself to heal Lambent Fire.
Cycle Round 3: the third Skirker casts Bad Juju on a random wizard.
That third-Round Bad Juju is skipped if any wizard flees the duel.
